caption: A man with a tall, grey, stylized wig and glasses sits in a studio setting, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt, a red bow tie, and beige suspenders. He wears black over-ear headphones and speaks into a black microphone positioned in front of him. The background consists of a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and some hanging clothing, including items labeled "LEE." Two distinct logos appear on screen: one featuring a microphone icon with the text "BOSS TALK 101" and another that says "PODCAST." As the sequence progresses, the man remains in the same position, slightly shifting his head and adjusting his facial expressions while speaking, though his overall posture and the surrounding environment stay consistent throughout the clip.
